example_1_en: The impedance must be controlled in high-speed avionics wiring.
example_1_zh: 高速航電線路中的阻抗必須被控制。
example_2_en: Cable impedance affects signal integrity and EMC performance.
example_2_zh: 電纜阻抗會影響訊號完整性與 EMC 表現。

example_1_en: Capacitive coupling may introduce noise into the receiver input.
example_1_zh: 電容耦合可能把雜訊導入接收器輸入端。
example_2_en: Reducing cable coupling is important for aircraft EMC design.
example_2_zh: 降低電纜耦合對飛機 EMC 設計很重要。
